question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your email address and we will send you a reset link. The link expires after 24 hours.

question: How do I upgrade my plan?
answer: Navigate to Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Select your desired plan and confirm. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and PayPal. For enterprise plans, we also support wire transfers and purchase orders.

question: How do I export my data?
answer: Go to Settings > Data Management > Export. Choose your format (CSV, JSON, or Excel) and the date range. Large exports may take a few minutes to generate.

question: What are the API rate limits?
answer: Basic plan: 100 requests/minute. Professional plan: 1000 requests/minute. Enterprise plan: 10000 requests/minute. Rate limits reset every 60 seconds.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Your account will remain active until the end of the current billing period. Data is retained for 30 days after cancellation.

question: How do I contact support?
answer: You can reach us via email at support@example.com, through the in-app chat widget, or by calling 1-800-SUPPORT during business hours (9 AM - 6 PM EST).

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. You can use an authenticator app or SMS verification. We recommend using an authenticator app for better security.

question: What browsers are supported?
answer: We support the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Internet Explorer is not supported. For the best experience, we recommend Chrome.

question: How do I invite team members?
answer: Go to Settings > Team > Invite Members. Enter their email addresses and select their role (Admin, Editor, or Viewer). They will receive an invitation email.

question: Is my data encrypted?
answer: Yes, all data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. We also support customer-managed encryption keys on Enterprise plans.

question: How do I set up webhooks?
answer: Go to Settings > Integrations > Webhooks. Click 'Add Webhook', enter your endpoint URL, select the events you want to receive, and save. Test events can be sent from the same page.

question: What is your uptime SLA?
answer: We guarantee 99.9% uptime for Professional plans and 99.99% for Enterprise plans. Current and historical uptime data is available at status.example.com.

question: How do I change my email address?
answer: Go to Settings > Profile > Email. Enter your new email address and confirm with your password. A verification email will be sent to the new address.

question: Do you offer refunds?
answer: We offer a full refund within 14 days of purchase. After 14 days, refunds are prorated based on remaining time. Contact billing@example.com for refund requests.
